enhancements.description: Full-width horizontal banner with a main message and optional small label; can be pinned to the top or bottom edge.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use for announcements, CTAs, episode labels, or short updates that should read like a news ticker or promo strip.

props.name: text
props.description: Main banner copy.

props.name: label
props.description: Small uppercase kicker above the main text (for example "Update" or "New").

props.name: position
props.description: Edge to attach the strip: "top" or "bottom". Omit for default bottom placement.

enhancements.description: Bold stacked headline lines, optional subtitle, and a CTA-style pill on a solid color field; lines animate in sequence.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use for booking prompts, signup URLs, or strong end-of-segment calls to action.

props.name: headlineLines
props.description: Array of strings; each string is one headline line (shown uppercase in the design).

props.name: line1
props.description: Legacy single headline line (use with line2, line3 if not using headlineLines).

props.name: line2
props.description: Legacy second headline line.

props.name: line3
props.description: Legacy third headline line.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Supporting line below the headline stack.

props.name: ctaText
props.description: Label inside the CTA pill (for example a URL). Alias: ctaLabel.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Primary panel and accent color (default blue).

props.name: staggerFrames
props.description: Frames between each headline line, subtitle, and button animation start.

props.name: fadeFrames
props.description: Fade and slide duration per step.

enhancements.description: Two-column comparison with a vertical divider: titles and bullet rows on the left vs right, row-aligned, staggered animation.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use to contrast two options, before/after, or traditional vs alternative in a structured list.

props.name: leftTitle
props.description: Uppercase-style title above the left column.

props.name: rightTitle
props.description: Title above the right column.

props.name: leftPoints
props.description: Left column bullet strings, or objects with text/label/point. Alias: left.

props.name: rightPoints
props.description: Right column bullet strings, or objects with text/label/point. Alias: right.

props.name: dividerFrames
props.description: Frames for the center line to grow in.

props.name: staggerFrames
props.description: Frames between each comparison row animation start.

props.name: fadeFrames
props.description: Frames per row fade and slide.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Background fill behind the layout.

props.name: dividerColor
props.description: Center divider line color.

props.name: leftAccentColor
props.description: Left title and bullet accent color.

props.name: rightAccentColor
props.description: Right title and bullet accent color.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Body text color for bullet lines.

enhancements.description: Vertical list of rounded cards on a green gradient, connected by a center timeline line; items reveal one after another.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use for comparison-table row labels, step lists, or category columns in an EV/finance-style layout.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of strings, or objects with title and optional subtitle (for example metrics with "(5 years)").

props.name: staggerFrames
props.description: Frames between each card’s animation start.

props.name: fadeFrames
props.description: Frames for each card’s fade and motion.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Primary title color inside cards.

props.name: subtitleColor
props.description: Secondary line color under the title.

enhancements.description: Full-frame bar chart with optional title and labels; bars grow in with staggered animation.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use to visualize a small set of numeric values (scores, counts, comparisons) over categories.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional chart title above the plot.

props.name: values
props.description: Numeric series for bar heights; largest value scales to full plot height. Aliases: series, data. Entries may be numbers or objects with a value field. If empty or omitted, a built-in demo series is used.

props.name: labels
props.description: Optional string labels per bar (aligned by index; shorter lists are padded).

props.name: lineColor
props.description: Bar fill color (name kept for JSON backward compatibility).

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Secondary accent (for example track or glow).

props.name: drawFrames
props.description: Frames for each bar’s grow animation after its stagger.

enhancements.description: Single large headline with a fade-in and an accent rule underneath.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use for chapter titles, section intros, or one-line emphasis on a calm background.

props.name: title
props.description: Headline text to display.

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Color of the decorative line under the title.

props.name: fadeInFrames
props.description: Duration of the opacity fade-in in frames.

enhancements.description: Broadcast-style lower third: name and optional role or label anchored toward the bottom of the frame.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use when identifying a speaker, guest, place, or on-screen subject.

props.name: headline
props.description: Main line (for example a person’s name or primary label).

props.name: subline
props.description: Smaller uppercase line such as title, organization, or location.

enhancements.description: Titled checklist with icon boxes in a column, vertical connector, and staggered row reveals.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use for process steps, service breakdowns, or ordered workflows.

props.name: title
props.description: Uppercase section title above the list.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of strings, or objects with label and optional icon (graduation, clipboard, edit, envelope).

props.name: staggerFrames
props.description: Frames between each row’s animation start after the header.

props.name: fadeFrames
props.description: Frames for each row’s fade and slide.

enhancements.description: Quote-focused overlay with large decorative quotation styling and optional attribution.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use when highlighting a testimonial, memorable line, or cited speaker.

props.name: quote
props.description: The quoted text to display.

props.name: attribution
props.description: Who said it (name, role, or source line).

props.name: verticalAlign
props.description: Set to "bottom" to anchor the block lower in the frame; omit for default placement.

enhancements.description: End-aligned ribbon label with horizontal rules that grow in from the sides toward the box.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use for short uppercase callouts, segment tags, or labels that sit on a horizontal band.

props.name: text
props.description: Ribbon text (shown uppercase).

enhancements.description: Italic stacked lines on a soft dimmed backdrop; each line fades and reveals in sequence.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use for poetic multi-line copy, chapter poetry, or layered statements.

props.name: lines
props.description: Array of lines to show from top to bottom. Preferred over line1–line5.

props.name: line1
props.description: First line if lines array is not provided.

props.name: line2
props.description: Second line.

props.name: line3
props.description: Third line.

props.name: line4
props.description: Fourth line.

props.name: line5
props.description: Fifth line.

props.name: staggerFrames
props.description: Frames between each line’s animation start.

props.name: fadeFrames
props.description: Frames for each line’s fade and reveal.

enhancements.description: Full-frame centered card with a headline and optional supporting line over a dimmed backdrop.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use when introducing a segment, chapter, or the overall topic of the video.

props.name: title
props.description: Primary headline shown on the card.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Secondary line below the title for context or a short tagline.

enhancements.description: Caption overlay built from word-level transcript JSON with active-word highlighting and readable grouped pages.
enhancements.whenToUse: Use when you want subtitles that stay tightly synced to speech and visually emphasize the currently spoken word.

props.name: transcript
props.description: Word-level transcript: array of tokens, or pass wordLevelTranscript, or an object containing word_level_transcript.

props.name: combineTokensWithinMilliseconds
props.description: Grouping window for each caption page. Lower values create more word-by-word caption changes.

props.name: timeOffsetSeconds
props.description: Shift transcript timings when the transcript is absolute to the full video but the enhancement starts later.

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Highlight color for the active spoken word.

props.name: textColor
props.description: Color for words in the current caption page.

props.name: inactiveTextColor
props.description: Color for words not yet spoken on the current page.

props.name: position
props.description: Caption block position: "bottom" or "center".
